query:
SELECT pt.id, pt.ticker, pt.currency, pt.fxRate, DATE(pt.transactionDate) as txDate, er.rate as availableRate
FROM portfolioTransactions pt
LEFT JOIN exchangeRates er ON CONCAT(pt.currency, 'CHF') = er.currencyPair AND DATE(pt.transactionDate) = er.date
WHERE pt.currency IN ('USD', 'EUR', 'GBP')
ORDER BY pt.id;
